title: polygala selloi
intro: Polygala selloi, also known as Butterfly Pea, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
